prestazioni: M57D30TÜ2 (N57D30O0) engine: BorgWarner EFR 7670 turbo upgrade with 62mm compressor wheel, 0.86 A/R turbine housing, and TiAL 44mm external wastegate for 450whp and 650lb-ft torque on stock internals with upgraded Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 CR) and Manley H-beam connecting rods

Full custom 3.5" turbo-back exhaust system by Remus with 200-cell catalytic converters, 3.5" stainless steel piping, and Valvetronic-controlled butterfly valves for backpressure optimization, paired with a Vibrant 1799 resonated muffler for deep, non-droning tone

Bosch CP4.2 high-pressure fuel pump upgrade with custom 1,200cc Siemens Deka side-feed injectors, ported and polished fuel rail, and custom ECU flash by MHD Tuning (Stage 2+ LCI map with EGR/DPF delete, custom timing maps, and 2,200rpm torque limiter removal)
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (E90-specific) with carbon fiber front fenders, extended rear quarter panels, and custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap with gloss black accents on the kidney grilles and mirror caps

OEM BMW M Performance carbon fiber front lip, rear diffuser, and side skirts (E90 LCI-specific), paired with a custom 3D-printed carbon fiber roof spoiler (25mm height) for downforce optimization at 150mph+ speeds

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (E90-specific) with 8kg/mm front springs and 10kg/mm rear springs, adjustable top mounts, and custom valving for Nürburgring lap times, paired with M3-spec front sway bar (25mm) and adjustable rear sway bar (22mm) by Hotchkis
